title: Arbitration restricted to a narrow club of male arbitrators, women don't clamour for it: Justice BV Nagarathna
description: Ahead of International Women's Day, Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna on Saturday raised concerns about gender disparities when it comes to arbitration-related opportunities for lawyers, noting that arbitration continues to be a male-dominated field.Justice Nagarathna was speaking at a symposium organised by the Indian Council of Arbitration (ICA) at Federation House in New Delhi, on the theme "Where Women Lead, Justice Follows."“Women never go and seek arbitration as such.
